lines.text: {name} looks distracted — eyes on the sky for a Snitch?
{name} breaks into a seeker dive down the wing!
{name} spots gold glinting — wrong ball, full sprint!
{name} uses the Force — the ball swerves unnaturally!
{name} meditates mid-press... then explodes forward.
{name} extends a hand — the pass obeys.
{name} emerges from nowhere — silent footsteps.
{name} raises the weapon — pure menace.
{name} stalks through the mist — defenders freeze.
{name} grabs the mic — crowd goes wild, play stops briefly.
{name} hits a stiff worked shot off the ball!
{name} cuts a promo on the touchline — momentum shifts!
{name} absolutely clatters someone — legal, somehow.
{name} shoots from downtown — power only!
{name} launches the ball like a freight train!
{name} unveils an untested gadget on the pitch!
{name}'s invention backfires spectacularly.
{name} calculates trajectory with a slide rule — chaos ensues.
{name} plots something off the ball...
{name} pulls a prank — chaos in the box!
{name} says the magic words — reality wobbles.
{name} calculates coldly — slow build, then knife.
{name}'s mask slips — reckless lunge!
{name} plays the long con — defense overcommits.
